name: Lettner Dresser Light Gray - Signature Design by Ashley: Traditional 7-Drawer Storage
description:
Satisfying your taste for tradition, this dresser sports serene sophistication. Forever classic design details-inlaid panels, silvertone patina hardware and bun feet-are so easy to love. Burnished light gray finish elevates the look with modern sensibility. Seven roomy drawers keep your wardrobe organized in style.
Signature Design by Ashley is a registered trademark of Ashley Furniture Industries, Inc.
